completed_steps.summary: Classified as multi-part monorepo with 2 parts (frontend: web, backend: backend)
Found 300+ existing docs including 14 claude rules, 41 agent defs, 100+ commands, 33 PRPs across 8 tool domains

Full tech stack analyzed: Frontend (Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui, React Query 5, Zustand 5), Backend (Python 3.11, FastAPI, OpenAI, LangChain, Claude Agent SDK), Shared (Supabase, Vercel, Render, GitHub Actions)

Deep conditional analysis via 4 parallel agents: API routes (196 files, 326+ handlers, 19 domains), Database (284 tables, 22 migrations, 17,629-line types), UI (470+ components, 95 primitives, 74+ hooks, 15 services), Backend (FastAPI with multi-agent AI, RAG, ChatKit)
Generated source-tree-analysis.md with annotated directory structure, critical paths, integration points, entry points
Generated development-guide.md with prerequisites, setup, commands, mandatory gates, scaffolding, testing, CI/CD
Generated integration-architecture.md with system diagram, 5 integration points, shared resources, data consistency patterns
Generated architecture-frontend.md and architecture-backend.md via parallel agents

Generated 4 supporting docs via parallel agents: data-models.md (284 tables), component-inventory.md (470+ components), api-contracts.md (326+ endpoints), deployment-guide.md, plus project-overview.md
Generated index.md master documentation index with all 10 cross-references verified
Validated all 11 files exist (10 content + 1 index), all cross-references resolve, total ~200KB documentation
Finalized documentation suite. All 11 files written to docs/ directory.

findings.project_classification: Multi-part monorepo, 2 parts, Next.js 15 + Python FastAPI
findings.tech_stack_frontend: Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS 4, shadcn/ui, React Query 5, Zustand 5, Framer Motion 12, Playwright 1.58, Jest 30
findings.tech_stack_backend: Python 3.11, FastAPI 0.104+, OpenAI SDK 1.0+, LangChain 0.1+, Claude Agent SDK 0.1.18+
findings.tech_stack_shared: Supabase (PostgreSQL + RLS + Auth + Storage), Vercel, Render, GitHub Actions (10 workflows)

resume_instructions: Scan complete. Run with mode=update to refresh documentation.
user_context: PRPs folder at docs-ai/contents/docs/PRPs is key planning resource. User notes extensive existing docs that may have stale/unnecessary content.
